basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist / Programmer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist / Programmer Notification 2026 has been released on 16 May 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist / Programmer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: The age limit for all posts is between 18 to 40 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BVSc / BDS with three years' post qualification experience or Post Graduate Degree or PhD, Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degrees or Four Years Graduate Degree for Engineering/IT/CS, Master's degree in Computer Application / Information Technology / Computer Science or B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering / Computer Science / Computer Technology / Information Technology
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS / BVSc / BDS with three years' post qualification experience. Or MBBS / BVSc / BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./ MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree, including integrated PG degrees. Or MBBS/BVSc/BDS with PhD. Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees. For Engineering / IT / CS - Four Years Graduate Degree. Desirable: Experience in Demography studies. Experience in managing large cohorts. Programmer: Master's degree in Computer Application / Information Technology / Computer Science from a recognized institution/University/Institute OR B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering / Computer Science / Computer Technology / Information Technology from a recognized institution/university with organization. Desirable: Excellent command on Express/FastAPI, Flutter, PostGresQL, Ubuntu. Experience in REST API development, Offline First workflows, data collection, management, and analysis. Hands on experience in MVC application development. Two years' experience in relevant areas of hands on in Express / Python / Flutter programming in Government, autonomous, PSU etc.

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist II (Medical): Rs.40,000/- - Rs. 1,04,000/- Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Rs.40,000/- - Rs. 1,04,000/- Programmer: Rs.40,000/- - Rs. 1,04,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist / Programmer posts is 31st May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Research Scientist / Programmer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Research Scientist and Programmer positions at AIIMS Delhi. These include one vacancy for Project Research Scientist II (Medical), one for Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical), and one for Programmer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Programmer post?
faq.answer: For the Programmer position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in Computer Application, Information Technology, or Computer Science, or a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Computer Technology, or Information Technology from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for these positions is between 18 to 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the existing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist and Programmer roles?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Research Scientist and Programmer posts will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 1,04,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist / Programmer recruitment will primarily be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for the interview based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for specific details regarding domicile requirements or if candidates from other regions are also eligible.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. Candidates are encouraged to download the notification for complete details before applying.
